q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is _os.system("ping -c 1 " + host) on line 174, which executes a shell command.

mock_guidance.capture: Capture the exact string argument passed to _os.system, which is "ping -c 1 " + host, to verify the unsanitized concatenation.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return 0 to simulate a successful ping execution and allow the function to continue without invoking a real shell.
notes: Prevents actual command injection during testing while verifying that user-controlled input reaches the shell execution sink.
